chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Constt: Petition.No.D-423 of 2017. _________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE ___________________________________________________ 01. For orders on office objection at “A”. 02. For orders on M.A.No.2346/2017 (E/A). 03. For orders on maintainability of main case. 15.03.2022 Mr. Qazi Sajid Ali M.Qureshi, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Abdul Hamid Bhurgri, Addl.A.G Sindh. = * = * = * = * = * = The petitioner being widow by way of instant constitutional petition has sought for her appointment in district judiciary on deceased quota basis; the appointments in district judiciary are being regulated by Sindh Judicial Staff Rules, 1992; which do not prescribe any quota for appointment of the family members of late/deceased employee. Consequently, the instant constitutional petition being misconceived is dismissed accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE
